identity_layer.spec: Universal profile with photo, name, location, roles, reputation level. Multiple roles per user.
have: ✓ Multi-role support (user_roles table, 4 roles: builder, founder, community_leader, investor)
gaps: ✗ Reputation score not computed
✗ Profile header is bare (no photo upload UI, no reputation badge)
✗ Achievement system doesn't exist
✗ Activity feed doesn't exist
✗ Profile 'Identity / Skills / Experience / Portfolio / Achievements / Activity' sections not built

builder_loop.spec: Passport (skills + portfolio + reputation) → Membership $20 → Arena (opportunities) → Level Engine 1-5
have: ✓ Builder profile table (id, headline, bio, skills, available)
✓ builder-stats endpoint (active services, orders, avg rating, total earned)
gaps: ✗ Builder Membership payment ($20) — Paystack not wired
✗ Builder Arena as a dedicated route (currently scattered in /work)
✗ Builder Level Engine — 5 levels with gating logic
✗ Builder Passport UI (currently just a profile)
✗ Challenge system (the spec says 'Complete challenge → earn DOT')
✗ DOT Starter Pack concept not implemented

founder_venture_loop.spec: Venture Profile → Valuation Engine (₦ + confidence + fundability) → Stages (Idea/Prototype/Growth) → Marketplace
gaps: ✗ 'DOT Venture Valuation' UI (client wants ₦ valuation, not just vantage points)
✗ Confidence % display
✗ Stage machine (Idea → Prototype → Growth with $1,000 milestone release)
✗ Deal Room (investor view of full venture + reports)
✗ AI Venture Advisor
✗ Builder matching (auto-recommend builders to a venture)
✗ Challenge completion tied to venture stage advancement

community_loop.spec: Community Dashboard (members, active, avg valuation) + Hub at dotlive.cv/community/name + Onboarding $2,000
gaps: ✗ Community Dashboard with metrics (members, active, avg valuation)
✗ Public community hub URL (no route /community/$slug yet)
✗ Community revenue tracking ($2,000 onboarding fee)
✗ Member ranking inside community
✗ Leaderboard UI

capital_loop.spec: Investor Dashboard (pipeline 120/40/12) + Filters + Deal Room + DOT Demo + Funding pipeline
gaps: ✗ Investor Dashboard with pipeline counts
✗ Deal Room (full venture + founder + reports view)
✗ DOT Demo event system (applications, judges, scores, rankings)
✗ Funding pool tracking
✗ Investor access fee ($2,000)

dot_economy.spec: Internal credit. Builder $20 + Community $2,000 + Investor $2,000. Used for tasks, courses, access, rewards.
gaps: ✗ Membership fee flows (builder $20, community $2,000, investor $2,000)
✗ Subscription model (recurring?)
✗ Pricing tier display in onboarding

admin_command_center.spec: Overview (100k users, 500M DOT circulation) + Users/Ventures/Capital/Reserve management + Audit log
gaps: ✗ Ecosystem Reserve wallet (100B DOT fund for grants/rewards)
✗ Wallet freeze/unfreeze action
✗ Featured ventures management
✗ DOT circulation metric on Overview tab
✗ DOT Demo management

ai_layer.spec: AI Venture Advisor ('your next best action'), builder recommendations, investor recommendations
gaps: ✗ AI recommendations engine
✗ LLM integration (or rules-based MVP)

tech_stack.spec: Frontend: Next.js. Backend: Supabase/Lovable Cloud + PostgreSQL. Integrations: Paystack, Whop, WhatsApp, Calendar.
actual: Frontend: TanStack Start (not Next.js, but same React stack)
Backend: Fastify on Render + Neon Postgres (not Supabase)
